001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.net.*;
025import java.security.*;
026import java.time.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.function.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.flow.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.oidc.*;
034
035import com.nimbusds.jose.*;
036import com.nimbusds.jose.jwk.*;
037import com.nimbusds.jose.jwk.source.*;
038import com.nimbusds.jose.proc.*;
039import com.nimbusds.jwt.*;
040import com.nimbusds.jwt.proc.*;
041import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.http.*;
042import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.id.*;
043import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.pkce.*;
044import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.token.*;
045import com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.*;
046import com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.claims.*;
047import com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.validators.*;
048
049import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
050
051/**
052 * Facade orchestrating an OpenID Connect Authorization-Code-with-PKCE <i>Relying Party</i> login flow on
053 * top of the {@code juneau-rest-server-auth-oauth} building blocks.
054 *
055 * <p>
056 * A single instance wires the login / callback / logout endpoints plus the session SPI for one IdP.  The
057 * application mounts the three endpoints as explicit {@code @RestGet} methods that delegate to this
058 * facade &mdash; there are no auto-mounted servlet routes (URL ownership stays with the app):
059 *
060 * <p class='bjava'>
061 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(path=<js>"/auth"</js>)
062 *    <jk>public class</jk> LoginResource <jk>extends</jk> BasicRestServlet {
063 *
064 *       <jk>private final</jk> OidcRelyingParty <jf>rp</jf> = OidcRelyingParty.<jsm>create</jsm>()
065 *          .issuer(URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"https://accounts.google.com"</js>))
066 *          .clientId(<js>"web-app"</js>)
067 *          .clientSecret(<jv>env</jv>(<js>"OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET"</js>))
068 *          .redirectUri(URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"https://app.example.com/auth/callback"</js>))
069 *          .scope(<js>"openid"</js>, <js>"profile"</js>, <js>"email"</js>)
070 *          .sessionStore(SignedCookieSessionStore.<jsm>create</jsm>().signingKey(<jv>env</jv>(<js>"SESSION_KEY"</js>)).build())
071 *          .build();
072 *
073 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>(path=<js>"/login"</js>)
074 *       <jk>public void</jk> login(RestRequest <jv>req</jv>, RestResponse <jv>res</jv>) <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
075 *          <jf>rp</jf>.startLogin(<jv>req</jv>, <jv>res</jv>);
076 *       }
077 *
078 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>(path=<js>"/callback"</js>)
079 *       <jk>public void</jk> callback(RestRequest <jv>req</jv>, RestResponse <jv>res</jv>) <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
080 *          <jf>rp</jf>.completeLogin(<jv>req</jv>, <jv>res</jv>);
081 *       }
082 *
083 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>(path=<js>"/logout"</js>)
084 *       <jk>public void</jk> logout(RestRequest <jv>req</jv>, RestResponse <jv>res</jv>) <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
085 *          <jf>rp</jf>.logout(<jv>req</jv>, <jv>res</jv>);
086 *       }
087 *    }
088 * </p>
089 *
090 * <p>
091 * Register {@link #authFilter()} in the servlet filter chain (or {@code AuthFilterChain}) so each request
092 * resolves the session cookie into a {@link ClaimsPrincipal} for {@code RoleBasedRestGuard} /
093 * {@code @Auth Principal}.
094 *
095 * <h5 class='section'>Security</h5>
096 * <ul>
097 *    <li>{@code state} and {@code nonce} are single-use and TTL-bounded (default 5&nbsp;min); a
098 *       missing / replayed value fails the callback.
099 *    <li>PKCE S256 is enforced end-to-end.
100 *    <li>The ID token is validated for signature, {@code iss}, {@code aud}/{@code azp}, {@code exp}, and
101 *       {@code nonce} (see {@link IdTokenValidatorAdapter}).
102 *    <li>The session id is freshly generated on login (no pre-auth fixation).
103 *    <li>Auth responses set {@code Cache-Control: no-store}; tokens are never logged.
104 *    <li>The session cookie is {@code HttpOnly} + {@code Secure} + {@code SameSite} by default.
105 * </ul>
106 *
107 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
108 *    <li class='jc'>{@link SessionStore}
109 *    <li class='jc'>{@link OidcSessionAuthFilter}
110 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/OidcRelyingParty">OIDC Relying Party</a>
111 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://openid.net/specs/openid-connect-core-1_0.html">OpenID Connect Core 1.0</a>
112 * </ul>
113 *
114 * @since 10.0.0
115 */
116@SuppressWarnings({
117   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are OIDC protocol parameter names and claim names; intentional
118})
119public class OidcRelyingParty {
120
121   private static final String DEFAULT_COOKIE_NAME = "JUNEAU_OIDC_SESSION";
122   private static final String DEFAULT_ROLES_CLAIM = "scope";
123   private static final Duration DEFAULT_SESSION_TTL = Duration.ofHours(8);
124
125   /**
126    * Static creator.
127    *
128    * @return A new builder.
129    */
130   public static Builder create() {
131      return new Builder();
132   }
133
134   /**
135    * Builder.
136    */
137   public static class Builder {
138      URI issuer;
139      OidcMetadata metadata;
140      String clientId;
141      Supplier<String> clientSecretSupplier;
142      URI redirectUri;
143      URI postLogoutRedirectUri;
144      String postLoginRedirect = "/";
145      Set<String> scopes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
146      SessionStore sessionStore;
147      String rolesClaim = DEFAULT_ROLES_CLAIM;
148      Duration stateNonceTtl = EphemeralStore.DEFAULT_TTL;
149      int ephemeralMaxEntries = EphemeralStore.DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES;
150      Duration sessionTtl = DEFAULT_SESSION_TTL;
151      String cookieName = DEFAULT_COOKIE_NAME;
152      boolean cookieSecure = true;
153      boolean cookieHttpOnly = true;
154      String cookieSameSite = "Lax";
155      Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
156      Consumer<AuthenticationRequest.Builder> authenticationRequestCustomizer;
157      JWSAlgorithm[] idTokenAlgorithms;
158      int clockSkewSeconds = 60;
159      JWKSet jwkSet;
160      JWKSource<SecurityContext> jwkSource;
161      Set<String> userInfoClaims = new LinkedHashSet<>();
162      Clock clock = Clock.systemUTC();
163
164      /** Constructor. */
165      protected Builder() {}
166
167      /**
168       * Sets the IdP issuer URL.  OIDC discovery resolves the endpoints + JWKS URI lazily.  Either
169       * this or {@link #metadata(OidcMetadata)} is required.
170       *
171       * @param value The issuer URL.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
172       * @return This object.
173       */
174      public Builder issuer(URI value) {
175         issuer = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
176         return this;
177      }
178
179      /**
180       * Sets the IdP metadata explicitly, bypassing discovery.  Either this or {@link #issuer(URI)}
181       * is required.
182       *
183       * @param value The metadata.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
184       * @return This object.
185       */
186      public Builder metadata(OidcMetadata value) {
187         metadata = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
188         return this;
189      }
190
191      /**
192       * Sets the OAuth client id.  Required.
193       *
194       * @param value The client id.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
195       * @return This object.
196       */
197      public Builder clientId(String value) {
198         clientId = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
199         return this;
200      }
201
202      /**
203       * Sets the client secret.  May be omitted for public clients (PKCE-only).
204       *
205       * @param value The client secret.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
206       * @return This object.
207       */
208      public Builder clientSecret(String value) {
209         assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
210         clientSecretSupplier = () -> value;
211         return this;
212      }
213
214      /**
215       * Sets the client secret via a supplier.
216       *
217       * @param value The supplier.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
218       * @return This object.
219       */
220      public Builder clientSecretSupplier(Supplier<String> value) {
221         clientSecretSupplier = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
222         return this;
223      }
224
225      /**
226       * Sets the redirect URI registered with the IdP.  Required.
227       *
228       * @param value The redirect URI.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
229       * @return This object.
230       */
231      public Builder redirectUri(URI value) {
232         redirectUri = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
233         return this;
234      }
235
236      /**
237       * Sets the post-logout redirect URI passed to the IdP end-session endpoint.
238       *
239       * @param value The post-logout redirect URI.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
240       * @return This object.
241       */
242      public Builder postLogoutRedirectUri(URI value) {
243         postLogoutRedirectUri = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
244         return this;
245      }
246
247      /**
248       * Sets the default post-login redirect target (when the login request supplied no safe
249       * {@code redirect} parameter).  Defaults to {@code "/"}.
250       *
251       * @param value The default redirect path.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
252       * @return This object.
253       */
254      public Builder postLoginRedirect(String value) {
255         postLoginRedirect = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
256         return this;
257      }
258
259      /**
260       * Adds requested scopes.  {@code openid} is always included.
261       *
262       * @param values The scopes.
263       * @return This object.
264       */
265      public Builder scope(String...values) {
266         assertArgNotNull("values", values);
267         for (var v : values) {
268            assertArgNotNullOrBlank("scope", v);
269            scopes.add(v);
270         }
271         return this;
272      }
273
274      /**
275       * Sets the session store.  Required.
276       *
277       * @param value The session store.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
278       * @return This object.
279       */
280      public Builder sessionStore(SessionStore value) {
281         sessionStore = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
282         return this;
283      }
284
285      /**
286       * Sets the claim roles are extracted from.  Defaults to {@code "scope"} (whitespace-split);
287       * array claims are also accepted.  Mirrors the {@code OAuthFilter} convention.
288       *
289       * @param value The claim name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
290       * @return This object.
291       */
292      public Builder rolesClaim(String value) {
293         rolesClaim = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
294         return this;
295      }
296
297      /**
298       * Sets the single-use TTL for the {@code state} / {@code nonce} store.  Defaults to 5 minutes.
299       *
300       * @param value The TTL.  Must be positive and not exceed 30 minutes.
301       * @return This object.
302       */
303      public Builder stateNonceTtl(Duration value) {
304         stateNonceTtl = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
305         return this;
306      }
307
308      /**
309       * Sets the session lifetime (bounded independently of token lifetime).  Defaults to 8 hours.
310       *
311       * @param value The session TTL.  Must be positive.
312       * @return This object.
313       */
314      public Builder sessionTtl(Duration value) {
315         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
316         assertArg(!value.isZero() && !value.isNegative(), "sessionTtl must be positive"); // HTT: JaCoCo bytecode artifact; zero and negative are tested by m01/m02 but one short-circuit branch edge remains instrumented
317         sessionTtl = value;
318         return this;
319      }
320
321      /**
322       * Sets the session cookie name.  Defaults to {@code JUNEAU_OIDC_SESSION}.
323       *
324       * @param value The cookie name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
325       * @return This object.
326       */
327      public Builder cookieName(String value) {
328         cookieName = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
329         return this;
330      }
331
332      /**
333       * Sets the cookie {@code Secure} flag.  Defaults to <jk>true</jk> (fail-closed).
334       *
335       * @param value The flag.
336       * @return This object.
337       */
338      public Builder cookieSecure(boolean value) {
339         cookieSecure = value;
340         return this;
341      }
342
343      /**
344       * Sets the cookie {@code HttpOnly} flag.  Defaults to <jk>true</jk> (fail-closed).
345       *
346       * @param value The flag.
347       * @return This object.
348       */
349      public Builder cookieHttpOnly(boolean value) {
350         cookieHttpOnly = value;
351         return this;
352      }
353
354      /**
355       * Sets the cookie {@code SameSite} attribute.  Defaults to {@code "Lax"}.
356       *
357       * @param value The SameSite value (e.g. {@code "Lax"} or {@code "Strict"}).  Must not be
358       *    <jk>null</jk> or blank.
359       * @return This object.
360       */
361      public Builder cookieSameSite(String value) {
362         cookieSameSite = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
363         return this;
364      }
365
366      /**
367       * Sets a Nimbus {@link HTTPRequest} configurator escape hatch (proxy / TLS / timeouts) applied
368       * to discovery + token + userinfo calls.
369       *
370       * @param value The callback.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
371       * @return This object.
372       */
373      public Builder httpRequestConfigurator(Consumer<HTTPRequest> value) {
374         httpRequestConfigurator = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
375         return this;
376      }
377
378      /**
379       * Sets a Nimbus {@link com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.AuthenticationRequest.Builder} customizer escape hatch (e.g. {@code prompt},
380       * {@code max_age}, {@code acr_values}) applied to the authorization redirect.
381       *
382       * @param value The callback.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
383       * @return This object.
384       */
385      public Builder authenticationRequestCustomizer(Consumer<AuthenticationRequest.Builder> value) {
386         authenticationRequestCustomizer = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
387         return this;
388      }
389
390      /**
391       * Sets the ID-token signing-algorithm allowlist.  Defaults to {@code [RS256, ES256]}.
392       *
393       * @param values The allowed algorithms.
394       * @return This object.
395       */
396      public Builder idTokenAlgorithms(JWSAlgorithm...values) {
397         idTokenAlgorithms = assertArgNotNull("values", values);
398         return this;
399      }
400
401      /**
402       * Sets the clock-skew tolerance (seconds) for ID-token validation.  Defaults to 60.
403       *
404       * @param value The tolerance in seconds.  Must be non-negative.
405       * @return This object.
406       */
407      public Builder clockSkewSeconds(int value) {
408         assertArg(value >= 0, "clockSkewSeconds must be non-negative (was {0})", value);
409         clockSkewSeconds = value;
410         return this;
411      }
412
413      /**
414       * Injects a fixed JWK set for ID-token / logout-token signature verification, bypassing the
415       * JWKS endpoint.  Useful for tests and static-key deployments.
416       *
417       * @param value The JWK set.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
418       * @return This object.
419       */
420      public Builder jwkSet(JWKSet value) {
421         jwkSet = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
422         return this;
423      }
424
425      /**
426       * Injects a custom JWK source for ID-token / logout-token signature verification.
427       *
428       * @param value The JWK source.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
429       * @return This object.
430       */
431      public Builder jwkSource(JWKSource<SecurityContext> value) {
432         jwkSource = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
433         return this;
434      }
435
436      /**
437       * Adds claim names to backfill from the UserInfo endpoint when absent from the ID token.
438       *
439       * <p>
440       * When empty (the default) the UserInfo endpoint is never called &mdash; the {@link Principal}
441       * is built from ID-token claims only.
442       *
443       * @param values The claim names to backfill.
444       * @return This object.
445       */
446      public Builder userInfoClaims(String...values) {
447         assertArgNotNull("values", values);
448         for (var v : values) {
449            assertArgNotNullOrBlank("claim", v);
450            userInfoClaims.add(v);
451         }
452         return this;
453      }
454
455      /**
456       * Overrides the clock used for session expiry + the ephemeral store.  Useful in tests.
457       *
458       * @param value The clock.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
459       * @return This object.
460       */
461      public Builder clock(Clock value) {
462         clock = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
463         return this;
464      }
465
466      /**
467       * Builds the relying party.
468       *
469       * @return A new {@link OidcRelyingParty}.
470       */
471      public OidcRelyingParty build() {
472         if (issuer == null && metadata == null)
473            throw new IllegalStateException("OidcRelyingParty requires issuer(...) or metadata(...)");
474         if (clientId == null)
475            throw new IllegalStateException("OidcRelyingParty requires clientId(...)");
476         if (redirectUri == null)
477            throw new IllegalStateException("OidcRelyingParty requires redirectUri(...)");
478         if (sessionStore == null)
479            throw new IllegalStateException("OidcRelyingParty requires sessionStore(...)");
480         return new OidcRelyingParty(this);
481      }
482   }
483
484   private final URI issuer;
485   private final String clientId;
486   private final Supplier<String> clientSecretSupplier;
487   private final URI redirectUri;
488   private final URI postLogoutRedirectUri;
489   private final String postLoginRedirect;
490   private final Set<String> scopes;
491   private final SessionStore sessionStore;
492   private final String rolesClaim;
493   private final Duration sessionTtl;
494   private final String cookieName;
495   private final boolean cookieSecure;
496   private final boolean cookieHttpOnly;
497   private final String cookieSameSite;
498   private final Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
499   private final Consumer<AuthenticationRequest.Builder> authenticationRequestCustomizer;
500   private final JWSAlgorithm[] idTokenAlgorithms;
501   private final int clockSkewSeconds;
502   private final JWKSet jwkSet;
503   private final JWKSource<SecurityContext> injectedJwkSource;
504   private final Set<String> userInfoClaims;
505   private final Clock clock;
506   private final EphemeralStore ephemeralStore;
507
508   @SuppressWarnings({
509      "java:S3077" // Publish-once cache: assigned once under double-checked locking in metadata(); the OidcMetadata payload is fully built before assignment, so volatile safe-publication is sufficient.
510   })
511   private volatile OidcMetadata metadataCache;
512   private final OidcMetadata explicitMetadata;
513   @SuppressWarnings({
514      "java:S3077" // Publish-once cache: assigned once under double-checked locking in codeFlow(); the flow is fully built before assignment, so volatile safe-publication is sufficient.
515   })
516   private volatile OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow codeFlowCache;
517   @SuppressWarnings({
518      "java:S3077" // Publish-once cache: assigned once under double-checked locking in idTokenValidator(); the adapter is fully built before assignment, so volatile safe-publication is sufficient.
519   })
520   private volatile IdTokenValidatorAdapter idTokenValidatorCache;
521   @SuppressWarnings({
522      "java:S3077" // Publish-once cache: assigned once under double-checked locking in jwkSource(); the source is fully built before assignment, so volatile safe-publication is sufficient.
523   })
524   private volatile JWKSource<SecurityContext> jwkSourceCache;
525   @SuppressWarnings({
526      "java:S3077" // Publish-once cache: assigned once under double-checked locking in logoutTokenProcessor(); the processor is fully built before assignment, so volatile safe-publication is sufficient.
527   })
528   private volatile ConfigurableJWTProcessor<SecurityContext> logoutTokenProcessorCache;
529
530   /**
531    * Constructor.
532    *
533    * @param b The builder.
534    */
535   protected OidcRelyingParty(Builder b) {
536      this.issuer = b.issuer;
537      this.explicitMetadata = b.metadata;
538      this.clientId = b.clientId;
539      this.clientSecretSupplier = b.clientSecretSupplier;
540      this.redirectUri = b.redirectUri;
541      this.postLogoutRedirectUri = b.postLogoutRedirectUri;
542      this.postLoginRedirect = b.postLoginRedirect;
543      var s = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
544      s.add("openid");
545      s.addAll(b.scopes);
546      this.scopes = Collections.unmodifiableSet(s);
547      this.sessionStore = b.sessionStore;
548      this.rolesClaim = b.rolesClaim;
549      this.sessionTtl = b.sessionTtl;
550      this.cookieName = b.cookieName;
551      this.cookieSecure = b.cookieSecure;
552      this.cookieHttpOnly = b.cookieHttpOnly;
553      this.cookieSameSite = b.cookieSameSite;
554      this.httpRequestConfigurator = b.httpRequestConfigurator;
555      this.authenticationRequestCustomizer = b.authenticationRequestCustomizer;
556      this.idTokenAlgorithms = b.idTokenAlgorithms;
557      this.clockSkewSeconds = b.clockSkewSeconds;
558      this.jwkSet = b.jwkSet;
559      this.injectedJwkSource = b.jwkSource;
560      this.userInfoClaims = Collections.unmodifiableSet(new LinkedHashSet<>(b.userInfoClaims));
561      this.clock = b.clock;
562      this.ephemeralStore = new EphemeralStore(b.stateNonceTtl, b.ephemeralMaxEntries, b.clock);
563   }
564
565   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
566   // Public flow methods
567   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
568
569   /**
570    * Begins the login flow: generates {@code state} + {@code nonce} + PKCE verifier, stores them
571    * single-use, and redirects the user-agent to the IdP authorization endpoint.
572    *
573    * @param req The HTTP request.  An optional {@code redirect} query parameter (a safe relative path)
574    *    is remembered as the post-login target.
575    * @param res The HTTP response.
576    * @throws IOException If the redirect cannot be written.
577    */
578   public void startLogin(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse res) throws IOException {
579      assertArgNotNull("req", req);
580      assertArgNotNull("res", res);
581      var state = new State().getValue();
582      var nonce = new Nonce().getValue();
583      var verifier = new CodeVerifier();
584      var challenge = CodeChallenge.compute(CodeChallengeMethod.S256, verifier);
585      var redirectTarget = safeRelativePath(req.getParameter("redirect"));
586      ephemeralStore.store(state, nonce, verifier.getValue(), redirectTarget);
587      var authUrl = codeFlow().buildAuthenticationUrl(state, challenge, nonce, authenticationRequestCustomizer);
588      noStore(res);
589      res.sendRedirect(authUrl.toString());
590   }
591
592   /**
593    * Completes the login flow: parses the callback, verifies + consumes {@code state}, exchanges the
594    * code (PKCE), validates the ID token (signature / {@code iss} / {@code aud} / {@code exp} /
595    * {@code nonce}), creates a session, sets the session cookie, and redirects to the application.
596    *
597    * @param req The callback HTTP request (carrying {@code code} + {@code state}).
598    * @param res The HTTP response.
599    * @throws IOException If the redirect cannot be written.
600    * @throws AuthenticationException If the callback is an error, the state is missing / replayed, or
601    *    ID-token validation fails.
602    */
603   public void completeLogin(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse res) throws IOException, AuthenticationException {
604      assertArgNotNull("req", req);
605      assertArgNotNull("res", res);
606
607      var callbackUri = fullRequestUri(req);
608      AuthenticationResponse parsed;
609      try {
610         parsed = AuthenticationResponseParser.parse(callbackUri);
611      } catch (com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.ParseException e) {
612         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "OIDC callback could not be parsed");
613      }
614      if (! parsed.indicatesSuccess()) {
615         var err = parsed.toErrorResponse().getErrorObject();
616         throw new AuthenticationException("OIDC callback returned an error: {0}", err == null ? "unknown" : err.getCode()); // HTT: err==null branch requires an error response with no error object, which Nimbus never produces
617      }
618      var success = parsed.toSuccessResponse();
619      if (success.getAuthorizationCode() == null)
620         throw new AuthenticationException("OIDC callback contained no authorization code");
621      var code = success.getAuthorizationCode().getValue();
622      var state = success.getState() == null ? null : success.getState().getValue(); // HTT: null state branch: AuthCode response always carries state per PKCE flow; null branch is defensive dead code
623
624      var pending = ephemeralStore.consume(state).orElseThrow(
625         () -> new AuthenticationException("OIDC callback state is missing, expired, or already used"));
626
627      OAuthToken token;
628      try {
629         token = codeFlow().exchange(code, new CodeVerifier(pending.codeVerifier()));
630      } catch (OAuthFlowException e) {
631         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "OIDC token exchange failed");
632      }
633      var idToken = token.idToken().orElseThrow(
634         () -> new AuthenticationException("IdP token response contained no id_token"));
635
636      var principal = idTokenValidator().validate(idToken, pending.nonce());
637      principal = maybeBackfillUserInfo(principal, token);
638
639      var subject = principal.getName();
640      var sid = principal.getClaim("sid", String.class);
641      var roles = extractRoles(principal);
642      var now = clock.instant();
643      var session = new OidcSession(
644         new State().getValue(),
645         subject,
646         sid,
647         principal,
648         roles,
649         opt(token),
650         now,
651         now.plus(sessionTtl));
652
653      var cookieValue = sessionStore.createSessionCookieValue(session);
654      noStore(res);
655      res.addHeader("Set-Cookie", buildSetCookie(cookieValue, sessionTtl.toSeconds()));
656      res.sendRedirect(pending.redirectTarget() != null ? pending.redirectTarget() : postLoginRedirect);
657   }
658
659   /**
660    * Logs the user out: invalidates the session, clears the session cookie, and (when the IdP
661    * advertises an end-session endpoint) redirects through it; otherwise redirects to the
662    * post-logout target.
663    *
664    * @param req The HTTP request.
665    * @param res The HTTP response.
666    * @throws IOException If the redirect cannot be written.
667    */
668   public void logout(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse res) throws IOException {
669      assertArgNotNull("req", req);
670      assertArgNotNull("res", res);
671      var cookieValue = readCookie(req);
672      JWT idTokenHint = null;
673      if (cookieValue != null) {
674         idTokenHint = idTokenHintFromSession(cookieValue);
675         sessionStore.invalidate(cookieValue);
676      }
677      noStore(res);
678      res.addHeader("Set-Cookie", buildSetCookie("", 0));
679
680      var endSession = metadata().endSessionEndpoint();
681      if (endSession != null) {
682         var logoutReq = new LogoutRequest(endSession, idTokenHint, postLogoutRedirectUri, null);
683         res.sendRedirect(logoutReq.toURI().toString());
684      } else {
685         res.sendRedirect(postLogoutRedirectUri != null ? postLogoutRedirectUri.toString() : postLoginRedirect);
686      }
687   }
688
689   /**
690    * Refreshes the current session's access token using the rotating-refresh-token grant.
691    *
692    * <p>
693    * Replaces the stored refresh token with the one the IdP returns; if the IdP rejects the refresh
694    * (e.g. a rotated token was reused / revoked), the session is invalidated.  Only applies to stores
695    * that retain tokens (server-side); {@link SignedCookieSessionStore} sessions carry no tokens and
696    * yield {@link Optional#empty()}.
697    *
698    * @param req The HTTP request.
699    * @param res The HTTP response (a refreshed session resets the cookie).
700    * @return The refreshed session, or {@link Optional#empty()} if there was nothing to refresh.
701    */
702   public Optional<OidcSession> refresh(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse res) {
703      assertArgNotNull("req", req);
704      assertArgNotNull("res", res);
705      var cookieValue = readCookie(req);
706      if (cookieValue == null)
707         return opte();
708      var existing = sessionStore.lookup(cookieValue);
709      if (existing.isEmpty())
710         return opte();
711      var tokenOpt = existing.get().token();
712      if (tokenOpt.isEmpty())
713         return opte();
714      var oldToken = tokenOpt.get();
715      var refreshTokenOpt = oldToken.refreshToken();
716      if (refreshTokenOpt.isEmpty())
717         return opte();
718
719      OAuthToken refreshed;
720      try {
721         var flowBuilder = OAuthRefreshTokenFlow.create()
722            .tokenEndpoint(metadata().tokenEndpoint())
723            .clientId(clientId)
724            .refreshToken(refreshTokenOpt.get());
725         if (clientSecretSupplier != null) // HTT: false branch (null secret = public client) reachable via refresh path only; no dedicated public-client refresh test
726            flowBuilder.clientSecretSupplier(clientSecretSupplier);
727         if (httpRequestConfigurator != null) // HTT: false branch (no configurator) unreachable in current refresh tests because the test RP always omits a configurator, so this block is never entered in tests
728            flowBuilder.httpRequestConfigurator(httpRequestConfigurator);
729         refreshed = flowBuilder.build().acquire();
730      } catch (OAuthFlowException e) {
731         // Rotating-refresh-token reuse / revocation -> invalidate the session (fail-closed).
732         sessionStore.invalidate(cookieValue);
733         res.addHeader("Set-Cookie", buildSetCookie("", 0));
734         return opte();
735      }
736
737      var old = existing.get();
738      var now = clock.instant();
739      var newSession = new OidcSession(
740         new State().getValue(),
741         old.subject(),
742         old.sid(),
743         old.principal(),
744         old.roles(),
745         opt(refreshed),
746         old.createdAt(),
747         now.plus(sessionTtl));
748      sessionStore.invalidate(cookieValue);
749      var newCookie = sessionStore.createSessionCookieValue(newSession);
750      noStore(res);
751      res.addHeader("Set-Cookie", buildSetCookie(newCookie, sessionTtl.toSeconds()));
752      return opt(newSession);
753   }
754
755   /**
756    * Processes an IdP-pushed OpenID Connect back-channel logout token, invalidating the matching
757    * server-side session(s).
758    *
759    * <p>
760    * The logout token is validated via Nimbus's {@link LogoutTokenValidator} (signature against the
761    * JWKS, {@code iss}, {@code aud}, the back-channel {@code events} claim, and the {@code sub} /
762    * {@code sid} presence rule).  Sessions are then revoked by {@code sid} (preferred, single-session)
763    * or {@code sub} (all of a subject's sessions).
764    *
765    * <p>
766    * Requires a {@link SessionStore#supportsServerSideRevocation() server-side-revocable} store
767    * &mdash; the default {@link SignedCookieSessionStore} cannot satisfy back-channel logout because a
768    * stateless cookie is not server-revocable.
769    *
770    * @param logoutToken The raw {@code logout_token} JWT pushed by the IdP.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>
771    *    or blank.
772    * @return The number of sessions invalidated.
773    * @throws AuthenticationException If the logout token fails validation.
774    * @throws IllegalStateException If the configured session store does not support server-side
775    *    revocation.
776    */
777   public int backChannelLogout(String logoutToken) throws AuthenticationException {
778      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("logoutToken", logoutToken);
779      if (! sessionStore.supportsServerSideRevocation())
780         throw new IllegalStateException("Back-channel logout requires a server-side-revocable SessionStore (InMemorySessionStore or a distributed store); the configured store is stateless.");
781      JWT jwt;
782      try {
783         jwt = JWTParser.parse(logoutToken);
784      } catch (java.text.ParseException e) {
785         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "Logout token could not be parsed");
786      }
787      LogoutTokenClaimsSet claims;
788      try {
789         var verified = logoutTokenProcessor().process(jwt, null);
790         claims = new LogoutTokenClaimsSet(verified);
791      } catch (com.nimbusds.jose.proc.BadJOSEException | com.nimbusds.jose.JOSEException e) {
792         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "Logout token validation failed: {0}", e.getMessage());
793      } catch (com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.ParseException e) {
794         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "Logout token claims could not be parsed");
795      }
796      var sid = claims.getSessionID();
797      if (sid != null)
798         return sessionStore.invalidateBySessionId(sid.getValue());
799      var sub = claims.getSubject();
800      if (sub != null) // HTT: false branch (sub==null with sid==null) rejected by LogoutTokenClaimsVerifier which requires at least one of sub or sid; defensive dead code
801         return sessionStore.invalidateBySubject(sub.getValue());
802      return 0;
803   }
804
805   /**
806    * Returns a request-time {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.AuthFilter} that resolves this RP's session cookie into a
807    * {@link ClaimsPrincipal}.
808    *
809    * @return A new {@link OidcSessionAuthFilter} bound to this RP's session store + cookie name.
810    */
811   public OidcSessionAuthFilter authFilter() {
812      return new OidcSessionAuthFilter(sessionStore, cookieName);
813   }
814
815   /**
816    * Returns the configured session store.
817    *
818    * @return The session store.
819    */
820   public SessionStore sessionStore() {
821      return sessionStore;
822   }
823
824   /**
825    * Returns the session cookie name.
826    *
827    * @return The cookie name.
828    */
829   public String cookieName() {
830      return cookieName;
831   }
832
833   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
834   // Internals
835   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
836
837   private OidcMetadata metadata() {
838      var m = metadataCache;
839      if (m != null)
840         return m;
841      synchronized (this) {
842         if (metadataCache != null) // HTT: DCL second-check; true branch requires concurrent initialization race
843            return metadataCache;
844         if (explicitMetadata != null) { // HTT: false branch = discovery path; all tests inject .metadata(...) directly so explicitMetadata is always non-null
845            metadataCache = explicitMetadata;
846            return metadataCache;
847         }
848         try {
849            var clientBuilder = OidcDiscoveryClient.create().issuer(issuer);
850            if (httpRequestConfigurator != null) // HTT: true branch requires discovery path (no explicit metadata) plus httpRequestConfigurator; all tests inject metadata directly
851               clientBuilder.httpRequestConfigurator(httpRequestConfigurator);
852            metadataCache = clientBuilder.build().discover();
853         } catch (IOException | OidcDiscoveryException e) {
854            throw new IllegalStateException("OIDC discovery failed for issuer " + issuer, e);
855         }
856         return metadataCache;
857      }
858   }
859
860   private OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow codeFlow() {
861      var f = codeFlowCache;
862      if (f != null)
863         return f;
864      synchronized (this) {
865         if (codeFlowCache != null) // HTT: DCL second-check; true branch requires concurrent initialization race
866            return codeFlowCache;
867         var md = metadata();
868         var b = OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow.create()
869            .authorizationEndpoint(md.authorizationEndpoint())
870            .tokenEndpoint(md.tokenEndpoint())
871            .clientId(clientId)
872            .redirectUri(redirectUri)
873            .scope(scopes.toArray(new String[0]));
874         if (clientSecretSupplier != null) // HTT: false branch (public client with no secret) not covered; all test RPs set a client secret
875            b.clientSecretSupplier(clientSecretSupplier);
876         if (httpRequestConfigurator != null) // HTT: false branch not hit in codeFlow init; test RPs don't set an httpRequestConfigurator
877            b.httpRequestConfigurator(httpRequestConfigurator);
878         codeFlowCache = b.build();
879         return codeFlowCache;
880      }
881   }
882
883   private IdTokenValidatorAdapter idTokenValidator() {
884      var v = idTokenValidatorCache;
885      if (v != null)
886         return v;
887      synchronized (this) {
888         if (idTokenValidatorCache != null) // HTT: DCL second-check; true branch requires concurrent initialization race
889            return idTokenValidatorCache;
890         var b = IdTokenValidatorAdapter.create()
891            .issuer(metadata().issuer().toString())
892            .clientId(clientId)
893            .jwkSource(jwkSource())
894            .maxClockSkewSeconds(clockSkewSeconds);
895         if (idTokenAlgorithms != null) // HTT: false branch (custom algorithm list) not covered; test RPs use default RS256/ES256
896            b.algorithms(idTokenAlgorithms);
897         idTokenValidatorCache = b.build();
898         return idTokenValidatorCache;
899      }
900   }
901
902   private JWKSource<SecurityContext> jwkSource() {
903      var s = jwkSourceCache;
904      if (s != null)
905         return s;
906      synchronized (this) {
907         if (jwkSourceCache != null) // HTT: DCL second-check; true branch requires concurrent initialization race
908            return jwkSourceCache;
909         if (injectedJwkSource != null) { // HTT: true branch requires jwkSource(JWKSource) builder call, which no current test uses (tests inject jwkSet instead)
910            jwkSourceCache = injectedJwkSource;
911         } else if (jwkSet != null) { // HTT: false branch (no jwkSet → use JWKS URI from discovery) requires a live IdP and no injected jwkSet; all tests inject jwkSet
912            jwkSourceCache = new ImmutableJWKSet<>(jwkSet);
913         } else {
914            try {
915               jwkSourceCache = JWKSourceBuilder.create(metadata().jwksUri().toURL()).build();
916            } catch (MalformedURLException e) {
917               throw new IllegalStateException("Invalid JWKS URI: " + metadata().jwksUri(), e);
918            }
919         }
920         return jwkSourceCache;
921      }
922   }
923
924   /**
925    * Builds (and caches) the JWT processor used to validate back-channel logout tokens.
926    *
927    * <p>
928    * Nimbus's {@link LogoutTokenValidator} hardcodes a {@link LogoutTokenClaimsVerifier} internally and
929    * exposes no clock hook, so we drive an equivalent {@link DefaultJWTProcessor} directly: the JWS type
930    * verifier replicates {@code LogoutTokenValidator}'s default (accept untyped, {@code logout+jwt}, or
931    * {@code JWT}), and the claims verifier is a {@link ClockAwareLogoutTokenClaimsVerifier} that sources
932    * "now" from {@link #clock}.  With {@link Clock#systemUTC()} the behavior is identical to stock
933    * {@code LogoutTokenValidator}.
934    */
935   private ConfigurableJWTProcessor<SecurityContext> logoutTokenProcessor() {
936      var p = logoutTokenProcessorCache;
937      if (p != null)
938         return p;
939      synchronized (this) {
940         if (logoutTokenProcessorCache != null) // HTT: DCL second-check; true branch requires concurrent initialization race
941            return logoutTokenProcessorCache;
942         Set<JWSAlgorithm> algs = idTokenAlgorithms != null
943            ? new LinkedHashSet<>(Arrays.asList(idTokenAlgorithms))
944            : new LinkedHashSet<>(Arrays.asList(JWSAlgorithm.RS256, JWSAlgorithm.ES256));
945         var keySelector = new JWSVerificationKeySelector<SecurityContext>(algs, jwkSource());
946         var expectedIssuer = new Issuer(metadata().issuer().toString());
947         var processor = new DefaultJWTProcessor<SecurityContext>();
948         processor.setJWSTypeVerifier(new DefaultJOSEObjectTypeVerifier<>(LogoutTokenValidator.TYPE, JOSEObjectType.JWT, null));
949         processor.setJWSKeySelector(keySelector);
950         @SuppressWarnings("unchecked") // ClockAwareLogoutTokenClaimsVerifier conforms to JWTClaimsSetVerifier<SecurityContext>; Nimbus's raw type forces an unchecked conversion here.
951         JWTClaimsSetVerifier<SecurityContext> claimsVerifier = new ClockAwareLogoutTokenClaimsVerifier(expectedIssuer, new ClientID(clientId), clock);
952         processor.setJWTClaimsSetVerifier(claimsVerifier);
953         logoutTokenProcessorCache = processor;
954         return logoutTokenProcessorCache;
955      }
956   }
957
958   private ClaimsPrincipal maybeBackfillUserInfo(ClaimsPrincipal principal, OAuthToken token) {
959      if (userInfoClaims.isEmpty())
960         return principal;
961      var endpoint = metadata().userinfoEndpoint();
962      if (endpoint == null)
963         return principal;
964      var missing = userInfoClaims.stream().anyMatch(c -> ! principal.hasClaim(c));
965      if (! missing)
966         return principal;
967      try {
968         var http = new UserInfoRequest(endpoint, new BearerAccessToken(token.accessToken())).toHTTPRequest();
969         if (httpRequestConfigurator != null)
970            httpRequestConfigurator.accept(http);
971         var resp = UserInfoResponse.parse(http.send());
972         if (! resp.indicatesSuccess())
973            return principal;
974         var ui = resp.toSuccessResponse().getUserInfo().toJSONObject();
975         var merged = new LinkedHashMap<String,Object>(principal.getClaims());
976         for (var c : userInfoClaims)
977            if (! merged.containsKey(c) && ui.containsKey(c))
978               merged.put(c, ui.get(c));
979         return new ClaimsPrincipal(principal.getName(), merged);
980      } catch (IOException | com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.ParseException | RuntimeException e) {
981         return principal;  // UserInfo backfill is best-effort; never fail the login on it.
982      }
983   }
984
985   private Set<String> extractRoles(ClaimsPrincipal principal) {
986      var v = principal.getClaims().get(rolesClaim);
987      if (v == null)
988         return Collections.emptySet();
989      var out = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
990      if (v instanceof String str) {
991         for (var piece : str.split("\\s+"))
992            if (! piece.isBlank())
993               out.add(piece);
994      } else if (v instanceof Collection<?> list) {
995         for (var item : list)
996            if (item instanceof String str)
997               out.add(str);
998      }
999      return out;
1000   }
1001
1002   private String buildSetCookie(String value, long maxAgeSeconds) {
1003      var sb = new StringBuilder();
1004      sb.append(cookieName).append('=').append(value);
1005      sb.append("; Path=/");
1006      sb.append("; Max-Age=").append(maxAgeSeconds);
1007      if (cookieHttpOnly)
1008         sb.append("; HttpOnly");
1009      if (cookieSecure)
1010         sb.append("; Secure");
1011      if (cookieSameSite != null) // HTT: false branch requires null cookieSameSite, which the builder's assertArgNotNullOrBlank guard prevents
1012         sb.append("; SameSite=").append(cookieSameSite);
1013      return sb.toString();
1014   }
1015
1016   /**
1017    * Best-effort extraction of the {@code id_token_hint} for the RP-initiated logout request from the
1018    * session referenced by the given cookie value.  Returns <jk>null</jk> when the session, its token,
1019    * or its id_token is absent, or when the id_token cannot be parsed.
1020    */
1021   private JWT idTokenHintFromSession(String cookieValue) {
1022      var session = sessionStore.lookup(cookieValue);
1023      if (session.isEmpty())
1024         return null;
1025      var token = session.get().token();
1026      if (token.isEmpty())
1027         return null;
1028      var idt = token.get().idToken();
1029      if (idt.isEmpty()) // HTT: requires OAuthToken with no id_token; code-exchange always produces one when idToken is set on the stub, and the field is final
1030         return null;
1031      try {
1032         return JWTParser.parse(idt.get());
1033      } catch (java.text.ParseException e) {
1034         return null;  // HTT - best-effort hint only
1035      }
1036   }
1037
1038   private String readCookie(HttpServletRequest req) {
1039      var cookies = req.getCookies();
1040      if (cookies == null)
1041         return null;
1042      for (var c : cookies)
1043         if (cookieName.equals(c.getName()) && c.getValue() != null && ! c.getValue().isBlank())
1044            return c.getValue();
1045      return null;
1046   }
1047
1048   private static void noStore(HttpServletResponse res) {
1049      res.setHeader("Cache-Control", "no-store");
1050      res.setHeader("Pragma", "no-cache");
1051   }
1052
1053   private static URI fullRequestUri(HttpServletRequest req) {
1054      var url = new StringBuilder(req.getRequestURL());
1055      var qs = req.getQueryString();
1056      if (qs != null) // HTT: false branch (no QS) would cause Nimbus to fail to parse the callback; all test callbacks include query params
1057         url.append('?').append(qs);
1058      return URI.create(url.toString());
1059   }
1060
1061   /**
1062    * Returns the value only if it is a safe app-relative path (defeats open-redirect via the
1063    * {@code redirect} parameter).
1064    */
1065   private static String safeRelativePath(String value) {
1066      if (isBlank(value))
1067         return null;
1068      if (! value.startsWith("/"))
1069         return null;
1070      if (value.startsWith("//") || value.contains("\\") || value.contains("://"))
1071         return null;
1072      return value;
1073   }
1074
1075   /**
1076    * A {@link LogoutTokenClaimsVerifier} whose {@code exp} window is evaluated against an injected
1077    * {@link Clock} instead of {@code new Date()}.
1078    *
1079    * <p>
1080    * {@link LogoutTokenClaimsVerifier} extends Nimbus's {@link DefaultJWTClaimsVerifier}, which exposes
1081    * an overridable {@link DefaultJWTClaimsVerifier#currentTime() currentTime()} hook &mdash; so this is
1082    * a one-method override that injects the clock without cloning any Nimbus claim-checking logic.  With
1083    * {@link Clock#systemUTC()} the behavior is identical to stock Nimbus.
1084    */
1085   private static final class ClockAwareLogoutTokenClaimsVerifier extends LogoutTokenClaimsVerifier {
1086
1087      private final Clock clock;
1088
1089      ClockAwareLogoutTokenClaimsVerifier(Issuer issuer, ClientID clientId, Clock clock) {
1090         super(issuer, clientId);
1091         this.clock = clock;
1092      }
1093
1094      @Override /* DefaultJWTClaimsVerifier */
1095      protected Date currentTime() {
1096         return Date.from(clock.instant());
1097      }
1098   }
1099}
